column3: Count of Present days. Half-Day Leaves count as 0.5 present.
Count of Week Off days in the month.
Count of Paid Leave days taken.
Half-Day Leaves converted to full-day equivalent.
Count of Unpaid Leave days. These directly reduce payable days.
Count of days marked LOP directly in attendance (rare). The actual LOP for salary deduction is calculated in the Leave Balance section.
Sum of ALL attendance categories = total calendar days tracked (= 28 for full month, or days up to DOE for resigned employees).

column2: = SUM(TotalLeaves, HalfDayLeaves, Marriage, ML, UL, MC, BL, MDL, LOP, TotalPresent)
column3: Working days excluding Week Offs and Holidays. Used as denominator for Attendance %.
KEY: Days for salary calculation. TotalDays minus UL (unpaid) minus LOP from leave balance utilization. LOP (column BO) is computed in the leave balance utilization section.
Attendance percentage = Present days ÷ working days.
Opening carry-forward leaves from previous month's closing balance.
Opening Casual Leave = January closing CL + monthly accrual (0.5/month).
Opening Sick Leave = January closing SL + monthly accrual (0.5/month).
Opening Earned Leave = January closing EL + monthly accrual (1.0/month).
Opening Marriage Leave — no monthly accrual; carries forward as-is.
Opening Extra EL = January closing Extra EL + monthly accrual (0.25/month).
Leave utilization drawn from Carry-Forward balance first.

column2: = IF(((L + HFL) − Util_CF) > Opening_CL, Opening_CL, (L + HFL) − Util_CF)
column3: Casual Leave utilization (after exhausting CF balance).

column2: = IF((L + HFL − Util_CF − Util_CL) >= Opening_SL, Opening_SL, L + HFL − Util_CF − Util_CL)
column3: Sick Leave utilization (after exhausting CF and CL).

column2:
= IF((L + HFL − Util_CF − Util_CL − Util_SL) >= Opening_EL, Opening_EL,
     L + HFL − Util_CF − Util_CL − Util_SL)
column3: Earned Leave utilization (after exhausting CF, CL, SL).
Marriage Leave utilization = number of MG days taken this month.
KEY — Loss of Pay: leave days that exceeded ALL available balances. This value feeds into TotalPayableDays = TotalDays − UL − LOP.
Closing Casual Leave balance (carry to next month).
Closing Extra EL = same as Opening (not consumed this month).
